[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000001 1
1 11000001 3
2 10001111 5
3 11000000 2
4 10101010 4
5 11001001 4
6 00011110 4
7 11111111 a

01 10 10000001 2
12 21 10000000 1
23 32 10000000 1
34 43 10001000 2
45 54 00001000 1
56 65 00011110 4 match 6
67 76 00000001 1 match 0
70 07 00000001 1 match 0
